calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove- Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant BGF Global LLC DBA BGF Trucking.

Dept.505; Judge: Cecilia Castellanos; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 10:12:00 a.m. and concluding at 10:29:23 a.m. (D505)

Tiffanie Brown, Esq. representing Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Defendant BGF Global LLC DBA BGF Trucking not appearing.
Witness Benjamin Seeman, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Counsel to proceed with examination of witness to lay a foundation for the request for judgment.
Counsel concludes examination.
The Court examines the witness and witness confirms that statements and declarations made are true and correct.
The witness is excused.

The Court finds that Plaintiff has laid the foundation and proven its case.

Good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffCreditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc and against Defendant BGF Global LLC DBA BGF Trucking. The plaintiff shall recover from the defendant as follows:

Damages $49,589.00
Interest $11,124.75
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $504.24
Total Judgment $64,042.99

Proposed judgment is signed and executed this day.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove- Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove- Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Continued To Sep-25-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Continued To Nov-27-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
